metadata.name: spout_orders
metadata.description: KYC-gated OTC order system for security tokens

instructions.name: cancel_order
docs: Cancel an order — user or authority, returns USDC for buy orders

accounts.name: usdc_escrow
docs: USDC escrow (needed for buy order refunds)

accounts.name: orders_authority
docs: Orders authority PDA (signer for escrow transfers + receives rent on close)

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: User's USDC account (for buy order refunds)

accounts.name: canceller
docs: Must be either the order's user or the config authority

instructions.name: close_usdc_escrow
docs: Close the USDC escrow (authority only, must be empty)

instructions.name: create_oracle_config
docs: Create an oracle config for a token mint with a Chainlink Data Streams feed_id

instructions.name: fulfill_buy_order
docs: Fulfill a buy order — CPI into SSTS to mint security tokens to buyer, close PDA

accounts.name: orders_authority
docs: OrdersAuthority vault PDA — receives rent back on close

instructions.name: fulfill_sell_order
docs: Fulfill a sell order — CPI into SSTS to burn tokens, transfer USDC to seller, close PDA

accounts.name: usdc_escrow
docs: USDC escrow for payout to seller

accounts.name: orders_authority
docs: Orders authority PDA (signer for escrow transfers + receives rent on close)

accounts.name: seller_usdc_account
docs: Seller's USDC account for payout

instructions.name: fund_vault
docs: Fund the OrdersAuthority vault with SOL (authority only)

accounts.name: orders_authority
docs: OrdersAuthority vault PDA — receives SOL

instructions.name: init_usdc_escrow
docs: Initialize a new USDC escrow with the current usdc_mint (authority only)

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Initialize the orders config, authority PDA, and USDC escrow

accounts.name: usdc_escrow
docs: USDC escrow token account owned by orders_authority PDA

instructions.name: place_buy_order
docs: Place a KYC-gated buy order — escrows USDC in escrow

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: User's USDC token account

accounts.name: usdc_escrow
docs: Program USDC escrow

accounts.name: user
docs: The user placing the order

accounts.name: orders_authority
docs: OrdersAuthority vault PDA — pays rent for PendingOrder creation

instructions.name: place_sell_order
docs: Place a KYC-gated sell order — event-only, no token escrow

accounts.name: user
docs: The user placing the order

accounts.name: orders_authority
docs: OrdersAuthority vault PDA — pays rent for PendingOrder creation

instructions.name: update_authority
docs: Transfer config authority to a new pubkey (authority only)

instructions.name: update_oracle_config
docs: Update an oracle config (authority only) — change feed_id, decimals, or staleness

instructions.name: update_usdc_mint
docs: Update the USDC mint in the order config (authority only)

instructions.name: withdraw_usdc
docs: Withdraw USDC from the escrow (authority only)

accounts.name: authority_usdc_account
docs: Alpaca USDC deposit wallet — hardcoded destination, can only send to Alpaca

errors.name: IdentityMismatch
errors.msg: Identity authority does not match user

errors.name: NotBuyOrder
errors.msg: Order is not a buy order

errors.name: NotSellOrder
errors.msg: Order is not a sell order

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Vault has insufficient lamports for rent

types.name: OracleConfig
docs: Chainlink Data Streams oracle configuration for a specific token
Seed: ["oracle_config", token_mint]

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint this oracle is for

fields.name: feed_id
docs: Chainlink Data Streams feed ID (32-byte identifier for the asset, e.g. AAPL)

fields.name: max_staleness_seconds
docs: Maximum allowed staleness for the price feed in seconds

fields.name: price_decimals
docs: Decimal precision of mid_price from the feed (8 or 18, varies per feed)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: OrderConfig
docs: Global config for the orders program
Seed: ["order_config"]

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin authority — updates prices, fulfills orders, withdraws USDC

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC token mint

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether order placement is paused

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: OrdersAuthority
docs: PDA signer that owns the USDC escrow
Seed: ["orders_authority"]

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: PendingOrder
docs: A pending buy or sell order, closeable on fill/cancel
Seed: ["order", user, order_id.to_le_bytes()]
Rent is paid by the OrdersAuthority vault PDA and returned on close.

fields.name: user
docs: The user who placed the order

fields.name: order_type
docs: 0 = Buy, 1 = Sell

fields.name: token_mint
docs: The token mint being bought/sold

fields.name: usdc_amount
docs: USDC amount (escrowed for buy orders)

fields.name: asset_amount
docs: Calculated asset amount

fields.name: price
docs: Price at order time (18 decimals, can exceed u64 for prices > ~$18)

fields.name: limit_price
docs: User-specified limit price

fields.name: created_at
docs: Order creation timestamp

fields.name: order_id
docs: Caller-provided unique order ID

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA
